etymology.description: simplified/variant form of 箕(箕) (jī, "basket"): semantic 竹(竹) (zhú, "bamboo") + phonetic 其(其) (qí, "his")
etymology.interpretation: The character 箕(箕) (jī, "basket") represents a basket made of bamboo, with 竹(竹) (zhú, "bamboo") indicating the material and 其(其) (qí, "his") providing the sound. The character 𠀠 is a simplified or variant representation of this concept, retaining the primary components.
